# The Prism core is cursed

The artifact at the center of the Prism arc isn't a relic — it's a binding. Anyone who carries it for more than three days starts hearing the voice of what's bound inside. The first Clue (omens in the refracted light) has landed; the party has noticed the prism throwing shadows that don't match the source.
